description: git-plugin hooks - PR validation and issue auto-close enforcement

hooks.prompt: Check the 'body' field in tool_input for GitHub issue closing keywords: closes, fixes, resolves (case-insensitive, followed by #N or owner/repo#N). If the body already contains closing keywords, return {"ok": true}. If the PR title or body is clearly for infrastructure, documentation, or dependency updates with no bug or feature issue to close, return {"ok": true}. If the title or body describes a bug fix or feature implementation but the body lacks closing keywords, return {"ok": false, "reason": "PR body is missing issue closing keywords. Add 'Closes #N', 'Fixes #N', or 'Resolves #N' to automatically close the related issue when this PR merges to the default branch. Use 'Fixes' for bugs, 'Closes' for features/enhancements, 'Resolves' for general issues. For multiple issues repeat the keyword: Fixes #1, Fixes #2."}
